query: Tell me about the companies behind my open support cases.
reasoning: The query requires information on open support cases, their corresponding companies, and additional details about those companies. To achieve this, I will gather open support cases from the Salesforce agent to identify the related companies, and then use all three agents to gather comprehensive information about those companies.

steps.task: Retrieve the details of all open support cases, including the associated company names and IDs.
Using the company IDs from step 1, gather comprehensive information about those companies including accounts, contacts, and relevant support history.
Using the company names from step 1, gather communication history and scheduling information related to these companies from Microsoft 365.
Using the company names from step 1, gather physical presence locations and product catalog related to these companies.

synthesis: Combine the results from steps 2, 3, and 4 to form a comprehensive overview of the companies behind the open support cases, including commercial, communication, and location information.
